settings.title: Wholesale Supply
settings.text: Competitive margins with tiered pricing, flexible MOQs, and pan-India fulfillment for retailers and distributors.

settings.title: Retail Partnerships
settings.text: In-store displays, training materials, and co-marketing support to drive sell-through at your locations.

settings.title: White Label
settings.text: Custom packaging and branding on our premium formulations — launch your own sneaker care line.

settings.title: E-Commerce Programs
settings.text: Dropship-ready inventory, marketplace listings support, and dedicated account managers for online brands.

settings.heading: Built for Scale
settings.subheading: Whether you're a boutique retailer or a national chain, we have a partnership model designed for your growth.

settings.title: Competitive Margins
settings.text: Tiered wholesale pricing that protects your margins at every volume level.

settings.title: Fast Fulfillment
settings.text: 99% fill rate with pan-India logistics and express dispatch options.

settings.title: Dedicated Account Team
settings.text: A single point of contact for orders, marketing assets, training, and growth planning.

settings.title: Marketing Support
settings.text: POS displays, product training, and co-branded launch campaigns.

settings.title: Premium Quality
settings.text: Lab-tested formulations trusted by sneaker enthusiasts nationwide.

settings.heading: Why Partner With Us
settings.subheading: We don't just supply products — we build partnerships that drive revenue, retention, and brand loyalty.

settings.title: Apply
settings.text: Share your business details, locations, and volume requirements through our partner form.

settings.title: Onboard
settings.text: Get matched with a dedicated account manager and receive your custom pricing proposal.

settings.title: Launch
settings.text: Receive your first shipment with POS materials, training, and marketing support.

settings.title: Scale
settings.text: Grow with reorder incentives, seasonal campaigns, and expanded product access.

settings.heading: Partner in 4 Steps
settings.subheading: From first inquiry to first shipment — we make onboarding seamless.

settings.side_text: Tell us about your business and our partnerships team will respond with a custom proposal within 24–48 hours.
settings.form_subtitle: Fill in your details and we'll get back to you with pricing and next steps.
